name: Louisiana Stuffed Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Bake yams at 350 degrees until tender.
3. Cut oranges in half and scoop out pulp, reserving some for stuffing.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine chopped orange pulp, melted butter, brown sugar, nutmeg, cinnamon, half of the pecans, and Grand Marnier or Triple Sec.
5. Mix well and stuff the prepared oranges with the yam mixture.
6. Sprinkle the remaining pecans on top of each orange.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
